# Claude Mega Batch Prompt — G2 Pilot Conversion

Use with:
- `docs/projects/g2-pilot-conversion-batch-2026-03-29.md`
- `docs/projects/remaining-work-master-backlog-2026-03-29.md`

---

## Full Prompt

```md
G2 starts now.

Activate this only if G1 is accepted as closed enough.

Do not start another infra moonshot.
Do not start another doctrine sprint.
Do not widen the product story.

This batch is:
`G2 — Pilot Conversion Batch`

Mission:
turn the safe-to-start wedge into a stronger paid-pilot operating loop.

Read and use:
- `docs/projects/g2-pilot-conversion-batch-2026-03-29.md`
- `docs/projects/remaining-work-master-backlog-2026-03-29.md`
- `docs/market/baticonnect-board-investor-memo-2026-03-28.md`
- `docs/operational-plan-90-days.md`
- `docs/market/sales/baticonnect-pilot-kit-fr.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `MEMORY.md`
- `ORCHESTRATOR.md`

What G2 must accomplish:
- one prospect-grade seeded scenario
- one baseline/progress scorecard for the pilot
- one clearer daily/weekly operator loop
- one cleaner, shorter demo path aligned with the commercial wedge

Desired result:
SwissBuilding is easier to demo, easier to pilot, and easier to convert,
without becoming a broad GTM platform.

## Non-Negotiables

- no new top-level product centers
- no new moonshot docs
- no broad analytics expansion
- no second vertical slice
- no marketplace/platform widening
- no doctrine reopening
- keep the lot wedge-first and commercially legible

## Allowed Internal Shape

At most 3 internal sublots:
- prospect-grade scenario + demo path
- pilot baseline + scorecard
- operator loop + pilot summary

Still one batch, one closeout.

## What You Should Optimize For

- easier paid-pilot execution
- easier sponsor/champion understanding
- shorter path from demo to pilot to conversion
- less encyclopedic seed/demo clutter
- more visible baseline/progress proof

## What You Must Not Optimize For

- broader category ambition
- more infra for its own sake
- more surfaces without pilot leverage
- more docs without product/operator value

## Return Before Coding

Return only:
- the 2-3 internal sublots you will use
- the exact pilot loop you are closing
- the seeded/demo surfaces you will simplify or strengthen
- the validation strategy

Then implement directly.

## Final Return Format

- what pilot loop is now stronger
- what became easier to demo
- what became easier to pilot
- what validations/tests prove it
- what remains outside G2
- whether the product is now more conversion-ready for paid pilots
```
